design_philosophy: Neo-brutalist, terminal-inspired, meme-card aesthetic. Reject clean tech gradients. Embrace raw edges, high contrast, solid blocks of color, and hard shadows. The design should feel slightly aggressive, highly functional, and exactly like a meme card that developers would screenshot and share on Twitter.

typography.font_family: Space Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
typography.notes: ALL headings must be uppercase. Use Space Mono (or similar monospace) for EVERYTHING to maintain the terminal/meme vibe.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing for sections (py-24), but tight, dense spacing for terminal data (p-4, gap-2).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none (0px). NO rounded corners anywhere. Sharp edges only.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Heavy borders. Use border-2 or border-4. Default border color #3f3f46, but hover/active states snap to #ff4500.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Hard flat shadows (Neo-brutalist style). NO soft blurs. Example: shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#ff4500] for primary elements, shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#3f3f46] for secondary.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento-style but raw. Grid items should have visible borders. background grids: bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#3f3f4633_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#3f3f4633_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:24px_24px]

buttons.primary: bg-[#0f0f0f] text-[#ff4500] border-2 border-[#ff4500] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#ff4500] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#ff4500] transition-all uppercase font-bold px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-[#18181b] text-white border-2 border-[#3f3f46] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#3f3f46] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#ff4500] hover:border-[#ff4500] transition-all uppercase px-6 py-3

inputs.default: bg-[#0f0f0f] text-white border-2 border-[#3f3f46] p-4 font-mono focus:border-[#ff4500] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none placeholder:text-[#a1a1aa] w-full

cards.meme_roast_card: bg-[#0f0f0f] border-4 border-[#ff4500] p-6 sm:p-10 relative overflow-hidden. Must look like a trading card. Use a massive absolute positioned background watermark (e.g., 'ROASTED' at 10% opacity).

badges.default: px-2 py-1 bg-[#ff4500]/20 text-[#ff4500] border border-[#ff4500] uppercase text-xs font-bold

media_and_icons.icon_style: Sharp, unstyled, stroke-width 2. Use Flame, Skull, CheckCircle, XCircle, Terminal.

image_urls.description: Mysterious hacker with neon mask. Use as an optional dark accent image or section background with heavy opacity overlay (bg-black/80).
Dark room coding aesthetic. Can be used for the 'AI Persona' or 'Lead Roaster' avatar.

media_and_icons.css_backgrounds: Prefer pure CSS patterns over images. Use the 24px grid pattern mentioned in layout_and_spacing to simulate a cutting mat or terminal background.

page_specific_instructions.landing_hero: Massive H1 'GET YOUR PORTFOLIO BRUTALLY ROASTED BY AI'. Subtext: 'FAANG engineers won't tell you the truth. Our AI will.' Primary CTA 'ROAST ME NOW'.
page_specific_instructions.input_section: Terminal window motif. A box with a fake terminal header (red/yellow/green dots, though use grayscale/red for brutalism) and an input field starting with '> paste url/resume'.
page_specific_instructions.loading_state: Do not use a simple spinner. Use a terminal typing effect: 'Analyzing garbage code...', 'Finding stolen CSS...', 'Calculating roast severity...'
page_specific_instructions.roast_results_meme_card: CRITICAL: This must be a self-contained div that looks amazing when screenshotted. Massive Score out of 10. A grid with two columns: left column '5 Brutal Callouts' (red borders, skull icons), right column '5 Exact Fixes' (green/orange borders, check icons). Bottom: 'One-liner Verdict' and a 'Share to Twitter' brutalist button.
page_specific_instructions.pricing_payment: Triggered on second attempt. '₹29 per roast. Server bills aren't a meme.' Razorpay checkout integration trigger.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure #f3f4f6 against #0f0f0f meets APCA/WCAG standards. The #ff4500 is very bright and serves as an excellent warning/accent color.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid in kebab-case (e.g., 'roast-submit-button', 'url-input', 'razorpay-pay-button', 'twitter-share-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the #0f0f0f background and #ff4500 accent.
Do NOT use Shadcn's default rounded corners. Apply rounded-none to all Shadcn components (Cards, Inputs, Buttons) via tailwind.config or class overrides.
Implement the hard flat shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#ff4500]) for the brutalist feel.
Ensure the 'Roast Results' section is visually distinct, boxed in a heavy red border, and structured like a sharable graphic.
Set the global font to a monospace font like 'Space Mono' or 'JetBrains Mono' (import via Google Fonts in index.html or layout if necessary).
Use the CSS grid pattern for the background of the hero section to emphasize the developer/terminal look.
